chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D – 340 of 2023 (Shoom Vs. P.O Sindh & others) DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.1538/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 14.02.2024 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate for Respondents / SMC Mr. Shahryar Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< At the very outset, it is stated by learned counsel for the petitioner that he would not press the disposal of instant petition before this Court on merits provided Municipal Commissioner, Sukkur Municipal Corporation is directed to transmit the application of the petitioners to Secretary, Local Government Department, Sindh for its disposal in accordance with the law. In view of above, the instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed as not pressed with direction to Municipal Commissioner, Sukkur to transmit the application of the petitioner to Secretary, Local Government Department, Government of Sindh for its disposal in accordance with the law within one month, if it is pending with him. Judge Judge ARBROHI
